calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-057/MECH-346/MECH-347 cue-authority lineage CLEAN EVIDENCE retest: re-run the 640a scaffold cue-recall gain sweep (cue_recall_gain{0.2,1.0,5.0} x kappa{2.0,10.0} + ARM_OFF, 3 seeds) now that modulatory-bias-selection-authority is VALIDATED (V3-EXQ-643a PASS). use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5 on every arm so the cue->z_goal->MECH-295 approach bias has bounded authority over the E3.select argmin in the contact-making scaffold P2 env. Promotes 640a (diagnostic, flat lift, authority OFF) to EVIDENCE.
items.note: EVIDENCE (claim_ids=[SD-057,MECH-346,MECH-347], all v3_pending; serial L6 cue-recall -> L4 token-pointer seed -> SD-057 bank chain co-tagged because the post-cue approach lift cannot be attributed to one link). Acceptance: PRIMARY C_LIFT_PRIMARY = post_cue_approach_lift>0 over within-run background on >=2/3 seeds in the pre-registered decisive cell ARM_CUE_g5_k10 (maximal cue_pull); GUARDS C1 cue fires + C2 trace captured (no-trace -> non_contributory instrumentation FAIL, route /diagnose-errors, NOT evidence-against). overall=C1 AND C2 AND C_LIFT_PRIMARY. evidence_direction: supports / weakens / non_contributory per the gate. Secondary (reported, not verdict-driving, multiple-comparison caveat): C_LIFT_ANY across 6 cells + gain-monotonicity. The single change vs 640a is use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5 (validated V3-EXQ-643a PASS 2026-06-06 after the float32 catastrophic-cancellation fix); NO SD-056 online training in this harness so scores stay bounded and no rollout-norm clamp is needed. Smoke --dry-run PASS end-to-end 2026-06-07 (7 arms, cue fires 30-60/run, z_goal forms ~0.42-0.46, acceptance machinery exercised). seeds=3 x conditions=7 -> 21 verdict lines; episodes_per_run=235 (stage0 20+stage0b 10+P0 120+P1 70+P2 15).

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.
